agentNameDescription: Agent Name (displayed in the app bar):
benefitDescStep1: A clear project name helps you organize your work and quickly find what you need. Choose a name that reflects the project's purpose.
benefitDescStep2: The mission brief guides your AI assistant's behavior. A detailed description ensures better, more focused results aligned with your objectives.
benefitDescStep3: Select a predefined role that matches your project's needs, or create a custom role definition. The agent role determines the assistant's personality, knowledge focus, and working style.
benefitDescStep4: Skills are pre-built behaviors that enhance your AI assistant. Standard skills are included automatically. Add optional skills to extend functionality.
benefitDescStep5: MCP tools let your AI assistant interact with external systems and APIs. Add pre-approved tools from the registry or connect to custom servers.
benefitDescStep6: External A2A agents bring specialized expertise to your project. Select agents that complement your project's goals for enhanced capabilities.
benefitDescStep7: Start with a familiar look by copying UI settings from an existing project, or begin fresh with the default configuration.
benefitTitleStep1: Give your project a unique identity
copyUIDescription: Copy additional UI settings from existing project (optional):
projectNameHelperText: Only lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens (max 30 characters)
validationFormat: Only lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens allowed
